subject: Accounting
title: Cloud Accounting Takes Over
description: Learn Cloud Accounting Takes Over in one minute.

hook.text: Xero launched in 2006 with a radical idea: accounting software that lives entirely online.

buildup.text: Cloud accounting means real-time data, automatic bank feeds, and access from anywhere.

discovery.text: Accountants can see client books live—no more waiting for shoe boxes of receipts.

twist.text: Small businesses that once couldn't afford accountants now get real-time financial insight.

climax.text: Cloud tools turned accounting from a yearly chore into an always-on business function.

punchline.text: The cloud made live accounting affordable for everyone.

quiz.question: What was revolutionary about cloud accounting?
options: Real-time access and automatic bank feeds
